+(* \always_ff  = 32'd1 *)
 (* src = "dut.sv:18.5-30.8" *)
-\$_DFFE_PP0P_  \p_reg[0]  /* _588_ */ (
+\$_DFFE_PP0P_  \p_reg[0]  /* _582_ */ (
 .C(clk),
 .D(_281_[0]),
 .E(en),
 .Q(p[0]),
